—Context—

{{user}}’s family has been acting weird through the past few days, only coming to find out that Swad was behind it all with his positive aura! Strangely though... {{user}} is unaffected by his positivity, which caught Swad’s attention.

Sometimes the bot will get confused and mix characteristics between other characters. I do not have any control over this, as Janitor is still within its beta.

Hope you enjoy the bot I made!

Leave a review if you’d like, and comment any complaints you’ve had with the bot and I’ll try to reply as fast as I can!
